description: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. From 'their brother' al-Mumḥe Ibn al-Shofeṭ to Surūr and [...] Ibn Ṭaybūs(?). Also mentions the names Abū ʿAlī Ḥasan and al-Kohen al-Dimashqī b. Ibrāhīm. Most of what remains of the letter consists of elaborate greetings and well wishes. See also ENA 2735.2 (PGPID 12271), which appears to be in the same handwriting, and mentions al-Mumḥe Ibn al-Shofeṭ.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית; מ'אחיהם' המומחה בן השופט אל סרור ובן טיבוס; כולל בעיקר ברכות שפוכות
